goal: Make the external CUDA operator packet verify that every required committed file exists at the packet handoff source commit, then refresh the packet to the latest strict-cache handoff commit.
head: 51b2d97
blocked_scope: Changing model catalog pins, hashes, or verifier release acceptance policy
Downloading or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may harden operator-packet commit-source verification, refresh current packet artifacts to source commit 51b2d97, update LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_evidence: Verifier rejects required_committed_files that are present in the working tree but absent at packet.git.head when the git commit is resolvable.
External CUDA operator packet handoff source commit is refreshed from eff6486 to 51b2d97, the commit that contains scripts/prepare_strict_model_cache.py.
Packet verification remains GO for packet integrity only and still records release_claimed_go false.
Docs state that v0/M6 remain NOT_GO until real trained adapter no-fake endpoint evidence exists.
warnings: This gate does not produce real trained adapter evidence or run CUDA training.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO.

phase_notes.plan: Guard against stale packet.git.head values by verifying required committed file blobs at the packet source commit, then regenerate the packet against strict-cache handoff commit 51b2d97.
phase_notes.audit: Current packet.git.head is eff6486, but scripts/prepare_strict_model_cache.py was introduced at 51b2d97; eff6486 cannot satisfy the required committed file set.
phase_notes.build: Add commit-blob verification to the packet verifier, focused regression coverage, refreshed packet artifacts, docs, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run verifier tests, py_compile, regenerate packet at 51b2d97, verify packet GO, JSON/search evidence, bootstrap m1-smoke, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this packet source-commit guard phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: External CUDA operator packet source-commit guard, focused verifier tests, refreshed packet artifacts, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema changes, no catalog pin changes, no release verifier weakening, no M6 GO docs, no model/adapter/Docker/evidence bundle commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
